14.reason: [Error: This line does not add a newline character, so all lines are concatenated into one. The lexer relies on newline characters to track line numbers, causing all tokens to be reported on line 1, and error line numbers will be incorrect.]

398.reason: The created token `tok` is not added to the `tokens` list, causing the `/` operator to be skipped in the output. It should be `tokens.add(tok);`.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  The created token `tok` is not added to the `tokens` list, causing the `/` operator to be skipped in the output. It should be `tokens.add(tok);`.

472.reason: [The lexer stops when curPos reaches input.length(), but if the last token ends exactly at the end of input, the final getChar() sets flag=1 without processing the last character properly. More critically, in cases like '}' at the very end, the loop may exit before calling next() to process it, causing missing tokens. The condition should allow one more call to next() when at end-of-input to flush the last token.]

The condition should allow one more call to next() when at end-of-input to flush the last token.]
